hero.title: Material Testing Equipment & Instrument Supply
hero.summary: Your One-Stop Source for Quality Testing & Surveying Instruments
hero.description: RECPL supplies a wide range of material testing instruments, surveying equipment, soil testing devices, laboratory apparatus, and NDT equipment for industries, construction companies, laboratories, and government agencies across India.

intro.title: Technical Procurement Support for Field and Laboratory Equipment
paragraphs: In addition to our consultancy, testing, and inspection services, Radiant Engineering Consultancy Pvt. Ltd. (RECPL) is a trusted supplier of material testing instruments, surveying equipment, soil testing devices, laboratory apparatus, and NDT equipment.

Whether you are setting up a new testing laboratory, upgrading your field equipment, or procuring instruments for a specific project, RECPL delivers quality products at competitive prices with expert after-sales support.

image.alt: Material testing and field inspection instruments arranged for technical procurement and deployment

catalogue.title: Full Product Catalogue
catalogue.note: Note: The complete product catalogue with 450–500 items will be updated here once received from the client. The above categories and items serve as a representative framework. Each product listing will include product name, brief description, specifications, and a "Request Quote" button.
catalogue.description: Looking for a specific instrument? Need bulk pricing? Contact our supply team for a customised quotation and fastest delivery.
